chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4108 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.18935/2023. 2. For orders on Misc. No.18936/2023. 3. For orders on Misc. No.18937/2023 4. For hearing of main case. 29.08.2023. Petitioner is present in person --------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking that the Respondents No.2 to 6, being the functionaries of Baqai Medical University, Karachi be directed to grant him time to pay the annual fee of two of his children, who are said to be enrolled at that Institution. As it stands, we have observed that the University in question is a private entity operating out of the public domain, hence a Petition does not lie. As such, if the Petitioner desires indulgence in the matter, he may approach the concerned functionaries of the University directly in order to advance his cause. Under the given circumstances, we are of the view that the Petition is misconceived. That being so, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with other pending miscellaneous applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
